name: Aimi Tabata
description:
__Nationality:__ Japanese
__Occupation:__ High School Student 

Aimi Tabata is one of Hiyori's friends from school. Not much has been shown about her personality. However, it is known that she is kind and supportive of Hiyori. She seems to be reasonable, calm, and mature. She often worries for Hiyori when she falls asleep (due to her soul slipping out of her body).
